dialogueChunks.intro: {target_npc} did something terrible while trying to protect the people they care about. They drove families from their homes near {location_hint}, claiming the area wasn't safe. They meant well, but the result is devastation.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The displaced are angry and lost. {quest_ally} has been sheltering them, but {quest_focus} left people without food, tools, or shelter. The {enemy_type} have moved into the abandoned homes, making return even harder.
dialogueChunks.outro: Someone needs to clean up the mess left by good intentions. {player_name}, will you help resettle {quest_stakes} and clear the way for them to go home?

playerResponses.text: Good intentions don't excuse the harm.
I'll help them get home safely.

dialogueChunks.intro: {quest_ally} loved someone so much they administered a forbidden treatment to save them. It worked against the original illness, but {quest_threat} is now worse than the disease ever was.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The patient is alive but suffering. {target_npc} examined them and says the treatment used {quest_item} in a way that was never meant for living bodies. A proper antidote exists, but the ingredients grow only in dangerous territory {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.outro: {quest_focus} can still be corrected, but time is critical. {player_name}, will you gather what {target_npc} needs before {quest_stakes} are lost to a well-meaning mistake?

playerResponses.text: I'll get what's needed for the antidote.
Love shouldn't cost someone their life.

dialogueChunks.intro: Something deeply wrong is happening at {location}. {target_npc} has been imprisoning travelers, convinced they're spies threatening the settlement. It started as vigilance and became cruelty.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} discovered {quest_focus} by accident: people locked away in a cellar, some for weeks. {target_npc} genuinely believes they're protecting everyone, but {quest_threat} has turned a loyal defender into a tyrant. The {enemy_type} raids they fear are real, but their response has gone too far.
dialogueChunks.outro: The prisoners need to be freed, and {target_npc} needs to be confronted. {player_name}, this requires someone from outside who can see clearly.

playerResponses.text: Those people need to be freed now.
How did no one notice sooner?
